trending_videos.title: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY – New Trailer (4K)
trending_videos.description:
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn't forgotten them. 

Watch the new trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, in theatres July 31. Tickets on sale NOW.

July 31, 2026

It's a BRAND NEW DAY for Peter Parker. Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn’t remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn’t forgotten them.

Directed by:   
Destin Daniel Cretton   
 
Written by: 
Chris McKenna & Erik Sommers and Justin Kuritzkes
   
Based on the MARVEL Comic Book by: 
Stan Lee and Steve Ditko

Produced by:      
Kevin Feige, p.g.a.
Amy Pascal, p.g.a.   
Avi Arad
Rachel O'Connor, p.g.a.

Executive Producers:    
Louis D'Esposito 
David Cain

Cast:  
Tom Holland

trending_videos.title: Shrek 5 | Official Teaser Trailer
trending_videos.description:
It’s happening... it’s really happening!  Experience Shrek 5 only in theaters summer 2027.
______
 
Next summer, DreamWorks Animation invites audiences on a thrilling, magical new comedy adventure from one of the most beloved global animated franchises of all time: Shrek 5.
 
Comedy legends Mike Myers, Oscar® nominee Eddie Murphy and Cameron Diaz return to their signature roles as Shrek, Donkey and Fiona. Emmy winning superstar Zendaya (The Odyssey, Dune franchise) joins the cast as Shrek and Fiona’s daughter Felicia, along with Marcello Hernandez (Saturday Night Live, Happy Gilmore 2) and Skyler Gisondo (Superman, Booksmart) as Felicia’s brothers, Fergus and Farkle.  
 
Shrek 5 is directed by acclaimed filmmakers and Shrek franchise veterans Conrad Vernon and Walt Dohrn. Vernon was a member of the directing team on the Academy Award® nominated Shrek 2 as well as on DreamWorks Animation’s Madagascar 3: Europe’s Most Wanted and Monsters vs. Aliens. Vernon has also provided the voice of

trending_videos.title: Street Fighter 6 - Yasmine Gameplay Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Hailing from the Philippines, Yasmine will rush you down with her skills in Eskrima on August 3!

Pay close attention to her movement lest you be on the wrong side of her karambit.

Yasmine can be purchased individually with Fighter Coins and the owners of the Year 4 Character Pass / Ultimate Pass will automatically get access to her when she releases.

https://www.streetfighter.com/6/

#StreetFighter6 #SF6 #Capcom #Yasmine #Capcom

superhero_content.description: Superhero-related content, particularly Spider-Man, is a dominant trend in the current YouTube landscape.

data.total_views_estimate: Approximately 30% of total views based on title popularity and channel influence.

insights: Spider-Man content is highly popular, with multiple videos focusing on trailers and breakdowns.
Content creators can leverage the popularity by creating reaction videos, Easter egg breakdowns, or speculation content around upcoming Spider-Man releases.

trailer_releases.description: Official trailers for upcoming films or games are consistently trending.
insights: Trailers generate significant viewer interest. Collaborations with movie studios or timely reviews can capitalize on these trends.
Opportunities exist for content that explores behind-the-scenes content or anticipatory discussions about these releases.

gaming_content.description: Gaming and challenge content continue to attract large audiences.
insights: Gaming content, especially those with unique challenges or collaborations with streamers, remains popular.
Exploring new game releases or creating interactive challenges can drive engagement.

high-profile_channels.description: Channels with established audiences are effectively leveraging popular trends.
insights: These channels tend to focus on high-interest content such as movie trailers and gaming, which results in higher engagement.
Smaller creators can emulate their strategies, such as focusing on niche breakdowns or partnering for content collaborations.

cross-genre_content.description: There's potential in creating cross-genre content that combines elements of trending topics.
insights: Creating content that merges superhero themes with gaming or challenges might attract diverse audience segments.
Exploring content that combines popular culture with interactive elements could uncover new audience engagement strategies.

emerging_trends.description: Stay alert to emerging film and game releases that could become trending topics.
insights: Monitoring announcement timelines for major film studios and game developers can help preemptively plan content strategies.
Developing content around speculative or rumor-based topics can engage audiences eager for insights into upcoming trends.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
